reason: Check that retry, persistence, filesystem, settings, and task evidence changes preserve end-to-end ownership and failure behavior.
Verify no retry implementation weakens create-only directories, handle-relative file operations, or historical task integrity.
Verify aggregate budget failure occurs before unbounded Base64 retention and does not omit legal Skill bytes.
Verify stale generation cannot roll back a newer same-value autostart owner and that canonical side effects converge correctly.
Verify task artifact reconciliation and repository-wide manifest validation remain coherent before archive.
